mapper.update:
UPDATE student
name=#{name},
no=#{no},
gender=#{gender},
clazz_id=#{clazzId},
degree=#{degree},
WHERE id=#{id}

UPDATE student
violation_score = violation_score + #{score}, violation_count = violation_count + 1,
update_time = NOW()
WHERE id= #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM student WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: select (case degree when 1 then '初中' when 2 then '高中' when 3 then '大专' when 4 then '本科' when 5 then '硕士' when 6 then '博士' else '其他' end) name, count(*) value from student group by degree order by value
select c.name clazzName, count(*) total from student s left join clazz c on c.id = s.clazz_id group by c.id, c.name order by total desc
